text: Being here, I feel a quiet curiosity and a touch of unease. The dim lighting and empty space at first seem slightly foreboding, almost liminal, as if I'm between worlds or moments. Yet as I step into the room and see the exhibit focused on research and development, my mind shifts. The interplay of technology and humanity, highlighted by the displays and text, draws my attention and makes me ponder our evolving relationship with intelligent machines. There is a feeling of anticipation, of standing at the threshold of discovery and reflection.
